basic.description: Basic search for electronics and collectibles under $500

high_value.description: Premium brand electronics with higher value potential

collectibles.description: Collectibles and vintage items with authentication

conservative.description: Lower risk strategy with smaller profit margins

aggressive.description: Higher risk strategy targeting maximum profits

standard_fees.description: Standard fee structure for most items

high_value_fees.description: Fee structure for high-value items requiring insurance

item_analysis.basic: Analyze this auction item for resale potential: Title: {{title}}, Price: ${{price}}, Condition: {{condition}}. Provide brand, model, retail value, and resale difficulty (1-10).
item_analysis.detailed:
As an expert auction analyst, thoroughly evaluate this item:

Title: {{title}}
Current Price: ${{price}}
Condition: {{condition}}
Description: {{description}}

Provide detailed analysis including:
1. Brand and exact model identification
2. Key selling features and value drivers
3. Market demand assessment
4. Potential issues or red flags
5. Estimated retail/market value
6. Resale difficulty score (1-10, where 1=very easy, 10=very difficult)
7. Shipping complexity (1-10)
8. Risk assessment

Format response as JSON.

listing_optimization.basic: Create an optimized eBay listing title and description for: {{title}}. Focus on SEO keywords and compelling copy.

sample_items.title: Apple iPhone 13 Pro 128GB Unlocked - Excellent Condition
sample_items.description: Excellent condition iPhone 13 Pro, fully unlocked, no scratches

sample_items.title: Vintage Nintendo Game Boy Color Purple Complete in Box
sample_items.description: Original Nintendo Game Boy Color in purple, complete with box and manuals
